# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice-secret
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: nodejs-microservice
type: Opaque
stringData:
  MONGODB_URI: "mongodb://mongodb-service:27017/appdb"
  SESSION_SECRET: "change-me-to-a-real-secret"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice-config
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: nodejs-microservice
data:
  NODE_ENV: "production"
  PORT: "3000"
  LOG_LEVEL: "info"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice-sa
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: nodejs-microservice
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: nodejs-microservice
    version: "1.0.0"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  revisionHistoryLimit: 5
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nodejs-microservice
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nodejs-microservice
        version: "1.0.0"
      annotations:
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "3000"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: nodejs-microservice-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      containers:
        - name: nodejs-microservice
          image: nodejs-microservice:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 3000
              protocol: TCP
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: nodejs-microservice-config
          env:
            - name: MONGODB_URI
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: nodejs-microservice-secret
                  key: MONGODB_URI
            - name: SESSION_SECRET
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: nodejs-microservice-secret
                  key: SESSION_SECRET
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            runAsGroup: 1000
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            successThreshold: 1
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            successThreshold: 1
            failureThreshold: 3
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 10
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: app-logs
              mountPath: /app/logs
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi
        - name: app-logs
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 200Mi
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: nodejs-microservice
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: nodejs-microservice
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice-pdb
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nodejs-microservice
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice-netpol
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nodejs-microservice
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - ports:
        - port: 3000
          protocol: TCP
  egress:
    - ports:
        - port: 27017
          protocol: TCP
      to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: mongodb
    - ports:
        - port: 53
          protocol: UDP
        - port: 53
          protocol: TCP
